titleStmt.title: SII 17.465: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 465. (A.R. No. 434 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.

This records the gift of 90 sheep, by Māṉimāṟpayaṉ, son of Nallaman Śōḻavi•• aṉ of Marudūr in Kaimalai-nāḍu in Gaṅgapāḍi, for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Mahādēva at Tirumaṟaikkāḍu, with one uḻakku of ghee, daily by the measure called Tirumaṟaikkāḍaṉ.
There is another damaged inscription along with this, which seems to record a provision of 1 tūṇi and 1 padakku of paddy to the same deity.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matirai
koṇṭa koppara
kecaripanmaṟkku
yāṇṭu 3 10 5 Āva
tu Ivvāṇ ṭumpa
ḷanāṭṭup perunte
vatāṉan tirumaṟaikkāṭṭu
mādevarkku gaṅgapā
ṭi kaimalai ñāṭṭu maru
tūr nallaman coḻavi
vaṉ makaṉ māṉimāṟpa
yaṉ vaicca nontā
viḷakku 1 Oṉṟukku vaic
ca Āṭu toṇṇūṟu ko
ṇṭu nicatamuḻakku ney
tirumaṟaikkāṭaṉā(l)
laṭṭuvomāṉom .There are two other damaged pieces, forming perhaps another inscription. They read:— 1 śrī [ma]ti••• 2 ṇṭa•••• 3••••• 4••••• 5••••• 6 va•••• 7 ḷara•••• 8 vaya•••• 9 tāṉam•••• 10 ṟaikkāṭu•••• 11 tevarkku•••• 12 nāḷ•••• 13 �pam•• 14 l•••• 15 i[yū]r••• 16 ḻavaṉ••• 17 mpamu••• 18 nikkina nellu••• 19 [ṇi] nāḻi nicata kuṟuṇi 20 ••pālaiyūr••• 21 uḷpaṭa•• nāḻi 22 •••• nicatam nellu aiṅkuṟu- 23 ṇiyum āka nellu tūṇi 24 ppatakkum ittevarkku śrī 25•••••• 26••••••
Digital edition of SII 17.465 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
